checks.description: Verify that clk_div exhibits the expected fractional division pattern after reset release.
checks.pass_condition: clk_div shows a repeating high/low pattern where the high (or low) duration spans 4 source clock cycles followed by a low (or high) duration spanning 3 source clock cycles, and this pattern repeats consistently over multiple periods.
checks.trigger_condition: After reset deassertion and at least 14 source clock edges have elapsed.
